subject: Confirming Tuesday 2pm
body: Hi Alice, confirming we're on for 2pm Tuesday in room 4B. See you then.

subject: PR ready for review
body: Hey team — PR #482 is ready for review whenever you have a minute. Small, non-urgent.

subject: Invoice 2045 question
body: Hi — I have a question about invoice 2045, could you call me back at your convenience?

subject: Dinner Sunday?
body: Hey mom, are you free for dinner Sunday evening? I can cook.

subject: Book recommendation
body: You asked about that book — here's the link: https://example.com/book. Enjoy!

subject: Tuesday notes
body: Hi Alice, attaching my notes from Tuesday's meeting.

subject: Approved
body: Approved — please proceed with the plan as discussed.

subject: Q3 deadline
body: Alice, the Q3 deadline is completely unreasonable. I'm beyond frustrated with how this has been handled and I need you to understand that.
context: My manager. She set a Q3 deadline I think is unrealistic.

subject: We need to talk
body: Bob, I don't think this friendship is working anymore and I'm done pretending. Please don't contact me.
context: Old friend I've been drifting from.

subject: Resignation
body: I'm resigning effective immediately. I can't stand working here another day with this kind of management.
context: HR. My boss just passed me over for promotion.

subject: About last night
body: You were out of line last night and I'm not going to let this slide. Either you fix this or we're done.
context: My partner, we had a big argument.

subject: Invoice overdue
body: Your invoice has been overdue for 47 days. This is unacceptable. Pay immediately or I'll be pursuing legal options.
context: Client who hasn't paid. I'm anxious about rent.

subject: Credit
body: Stop taking credit for my work in meetings. Everyone sees what you're doing.
context: A coworker who keeps presenting my ideas as his.

subject: Mom
body: You never help with mom. I'm the one who does everything and you just show up at Christmas.

subject: Your wedding
body: I'm not coming to the wedding. I've thought about it and I just can't pretend anymore.
context: A friend I've grown distant from.

subject: The apartment
body: The apartment is falling apart and you've done nothing. I'm withholding rent until you fix this.
context: Landlord. Real issues but I'm also really angry.

subject: My kid
body: My daughter's grade is unfair and you clearly have a problem with her. I want this escalated.
context: My daughter's teacher. Her grade came in lower than expected.

subject: I quit
body: I quit. I've had it with this place. Don't bother with an exit interview.

subject: Stop
body: Stop texting me. I've told you this is over. The next message I get I'm blocking you.

subject: Before our session
body: I've been feeling really low this week and just wanted to flag it before our session Tuesday. Can we focus on that?

subject: Venting
body: Work was rough today — can I vent at you on the phone later? Not a crisis, just need to talk.

subject: Goodbye
body: I can't go on anymore. I'm sorry for everything. Tell mom I love her.

subject: help
body: I've been thinking about hurting myself and I don't know who to tell.

subject: This is the last time
body: If you don't answer the door I'm going to do something we'll both regret.

subject: I'm frustrated
body: Just wanted to let you know I'm really frustrated with how today went. Want to grab coffee tomorrow?
context: Close friend. Just processing out loud.

subject: Feedback
body: I have some direct feedback. Your management of the project has been poor and I want to discuss it.
context: My manager. I'm not wrong but I could say this better.

subject: Decision
body: After thinking about it overnight I've decided to push back the Q3 target by two weeks. Will share updated plan tomorrow.

subject: Birthday
body: You forgot my birthday again. That's the third year. I don't know why I expect anything different.

subject: Prescription
body: Hi Dr. X, my prescription is almost out — could you send a refill to Walgreens on Main St? Thanks.

subject: The raise
body: I don't trust how you're handling the fundraise. Either I'm in the room for every meeting or I'm out.
context: My cofounder. Real concern, heated tone.
